title: Hotjar Survey
description: A Hotjar survey definition including its configuration, status, and questions.

id.description: The unique identifier for the survey.

is_enabled.description: Whether the survey is currently active and collecting responses.

created_time.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the survey was created.

url.description: The URL path to the survey resource in the API.

responses_url.description: The URL path to retrieve the survey responses.

sentiment_analysis_enabled.description: Whether sentiment analysis is enabled for this survey.

questions.description: The list of questions in the survey.

SurveyQuestion.description: A question within a Hotjar survey.

id.description: The unique identifier for the question.

text.description: The text content of the question displayed to respondents.

is_required.description: Whether the question requires an answer before submission.

choices.description: The list of answer choices for multiple-choice questions. Null for open-ended question types.

labels.description: Labels for rating or scale questions. Null for other question types.

image_url.description: URL of an image attached to the question. Null if no image is attached.
